name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: We have to keep fighting every. single. day.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71d6/24c69fd9/fbfb027e/18ee3b6a/472826649/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all&source=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all")
---

Peter,

December marked our best online membership week ever(!), but we need January's membership week to be even bigger.

Donald Trump just became president. Republicans in Congress are rushing his nominees through while simultaneously starting the repeal of Obamacare -- without a plan to help the tens of millions of Americans who rely on it for health care.

The stakes haven't been much higher. Which is why we need to show that we are stronger than ever before. And we're going to do it with record-breaking membership numbers.

**[Become a 2017 EMILY's List member to be a part of our biggest online membership week ever.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71d6/24c69fd9/fbfb027e/18ee3b6b/472826649/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+if+consinConsGroup4503Renew+your+EMILYs+&utm_campaign=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all&source=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all")**

I have no doubt this community will step up. I've seen it time and again when the going gets tough.

This past weekend, millions of women around the world got together to march, rally, and show Donald Trump and his administration that they won't back down.

But the energy and enthusiasm can't stop there. We have to keep fighting every. single. day.

That's what an EMILY's List member does. Every member helps fund our work to recruit, train, and build winning campaigns for pro-choice Democratic women -- women who will stand up to out-of-touch, extreme, and dangerous Republicans.

**Become a 2017 EMILY's List member during our January Membership Week:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Your-2017-Membership](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71d6/24c69fd9/fbfb027e/18ee3b64/472826649/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgYour2017Membersh&utm_campaign=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all&source=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71d6/24c69fd9/fbfb027e/18ee3b65/472826649/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all&source=WQEFR130N_digital_email_20170123_MembershipBetter_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|

subject: 74 percent of Americans want to see Trump's tax returns - add your name if you do, too:
body:
74 percent of Americans want Trump to release his tax returns
---
**Add your name: tell Donald Trump to release his tax returns.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170124_ew_nd&source=em_20170124_ew_nd")**
Friend --

In the first 48 hours of the Trump administration, more than 200,000 people called on the White House to release Donald Trump's tax returns.

On Sunday, one of Trump's most senior aides delivered the official administration response: no. Because "people don't care."

In fact, 74 percent of Americans want Trump to release his tax returns. **If you're one of them, click this button and sign your name to our petition to Donald Trump:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170124_ew_nd&source=em_20170124_ew_nd")**
We deserve to know if Trump is personally profiting from the presidency -- and we know we can't trust Trump's answer unless we can see the evidence for ourselves.

Thanks for taking action.

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

name: Dr. Michael Mann
subject: this shouldn't be controversial
body:
Friend,

_" I'm going to say something that is really controversial in some places in Washington: We believe in science."_
-Senator Elizabeth Warren, 1/21/17
On Saturday, Senator Warren took on the climate deniers and delivered a powerful statement: "We know that climate change is real and we have a moral responsibility to protect this earth for our children and our grandchildren."

[**Add your name to stand with Senator Warren and tell President Trump you believe in science >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3655169017464750080/-6409720681864364032)

Something that 97% of scientists agree on shouldn't be controversial. We know that climate change is real, and it's caused by human activity. Yet Trump's EPA nominee, Scott Pruitt, said during his confirmation hearing that it's a matter for "continuing debate."

This has the potential to set us back decades. As I wrote in a recent _Washington Post_ op-ed, Pruitt's alarming disrespect for science "betrays profound ignorance of the state of our scientific knowledge."

[**We can work together and stand up for science. Sign our letter to the Trump administration: Oppose climate deniers like Pruitt >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3655169017464750080/-6409720681864364032)

In the past, Democrats and Republicans backed clean air and water standards, combating the damage caused by industrial waste and pollution. Today, with climate deniers like Trump and Scott Pruitt in charge, a dangerous assault on science has already begun, with potential to undo all the progress we've made in the past several decades.

But we can work together and stop them. Help us make it clear to the Trump administration you won't let them deny science and harm the environment.

[**Stand with our over 70,000 supporters and 97% of scientists and help us send a message: We won 't tolerate climate change deniers, and we believe in science.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3655169017464750080/-6409720681864364032)

Our voices can make a difference. Together, we will hold the climate deniers accountable and make sure we do our part to protect our environment.

Onward,
Dr. Michael Mann
_Dr. Michael Mann is the Distinguished Professor of Meteorology at Penn State University. He is the author of several books on the subject, including The Madhouse Effect 1, Dire predictions: understanding global warming2, and The Hockey Stick and the Climate Wars: Dispatches from the Front Lines3._

[1] New York: Columbia University Press. ISBN 978-0-231-17786-3
[2] DK. ISBN 978-1-4654-3364-0.
[3] Columbia University Press. ISBN 978-0-231-15254-9.
---

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Your 2017 EMILY's List membership (ending soon) >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71ba/24c69fd9/fb93a390/18ee2f70/131096020/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR131N_digital_email_20170124_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR131N_digital_email_20170124_MembershipLast_n-all")
---

Peter,

Today is your last chance to become a 2017 EMILY's List member in January.

As members, we show that we're fully dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women -- and that dedication is more important now than ever.

Millions of us marched on Saturday, but the Republican-controlled Congress is already attacking women's health care. We need to send more pro-choice Democratic women to fight back.

**[Donate $3 now to become an EMILY's List member for 2017-- it's your last chance in January!](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c71ba/24c69fd9/fb93a390/18ee2f71/131096020/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170118_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+if+consinConsGroup4503re&utm_campaign=WQEFR131N_digital_email_20170124_MembershipLast_n-all&source=WQEFR131N_digital_email_20170124_MembershipLast_n-all")**

These next few months are when we do a lot of our planning for the election cycle. Knowing how many of us are in it for the long haul is crucial.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: BREAKING: Keystone XL and DAPL
body:
It is clear Donald Trump is willing to prioritize the fossil fuel industry over the health and well-being of our planet.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Earlier today, Donald Trump signed two executive orders to advance construction of the Keystone XL pipeline and the Dakota Access Pipeline.
It is clear Donald Trump is willing to prioritize the fossil fuel industry over the health and well-being of our planet. If these pipelines are built, it will have devastating effects on the climate, our land and our water. Additionally, it goes against the will of millions of people who stood up to oppose these pipelines in the first place.
**Once again, we must make our voices heard all over the country saying we do not accept Trump's effort to resume construction of these harmful pipelines.**
[**Please add your name today showing you 're still with us in the fight against the dangerous Keystone XL Pipeline and the Dakota Access Pipeline.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/DAPL-keystone-XL?source=em170124 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/DAPL-keystone-XL?source=em170124")
The big oil companies that want to build these pipelines have terrible records of negligence and spills. Just one spill threatens the safety of water for millions of Americans.
In 2015, President Obama rejected the Keystone XL pipeline over environmental concerns, and last December construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline was halted due to the relentless pressure from water protectors and activists on the ground.
Moving forward with the Dakota Access Pipeline will threaten the sacred grounds of the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe. For months, water protectors braved freezing temperatures, arrest, and police brutality to defend their land and water.
**Now that Trump has signed these executive orders, it's on us to hold him accountable and mobilize to stop the construction of these dangerous pipelines.**
We must continue to fight against the threat of climate change and for the communities whose health and safety are threatened by these pipelines.
[**Add your name to stand with us against the Dakota Access Pipeline and the Keystone XL Pipeline.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/DAPL-keystone-XL?source=em170124 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/DAPL-keystone-XL?source=em170124")
We've shown what is possible when people come together to speak out against injustice. Now we must stand together to oppose the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Our Revolution
